items.name: Boombox Catalog Avatar Creator - Speaker (Rainbow)
items.description:
A musical radio player for your fashion wardrobe. 

Listen to songs while you try on outfits with the RELICSxyz Boombox IDOL. This UGC item unlocks 50+ songs across expanded playlists of different music genres, curated specifically for Catalog Avatar Creator. We have recently updated this UGC to the v2 music player that now includes audio-reactive auras and upgraded skins for a unique look. 

This UGC item is also an update to the original, optimizing the boombox visually. It just looks better!

items.name: BackpackWith Dark eyes guided Red 2.0

Sinister Dragon Blue Eyes: a cursed relic forged in the shadows. This demon eye backpack glows with guided blue fury, channeling blazing beast energy and red mystic rage. Its inferno eyes lead warriors into chaotic fantasy battles with RPG backpack flair and horror style impact. Crafted for those who live in dark core fashion and seek hype gear thrills. Forget the green dragon—this is pure apocalypse gear. Want more UGCs? 🔥 Join the TOKYO UGC COMMUNITY!
